subject: IVX Holdings — investment opportunity
body:
Hi Jordan,

I'm reaching out from IVX Holdings about a current investment opportunity in industrial real estate.

IVX deploys capital into vetted, income-producing and value-add real estate and adjacent ventures. If useful, I can share a short overview and the relevant materials.

Would you be open to a brief introductory call?

Best regards,
IVX Holdings — Investor Relations
investors@ivxholding.com

— This is not an offer to sell securities. Reply STOP to opt out.
